subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Although it has been a long time since I have written a letter, this is due to the multitude of obstacles and preoccupations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر چند مدتیست مدید که نامه ای ننگاشتم این از کثرت موانع و استیلاء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
